items.title: Nikola Jokic Future in Denver, Jaylen Brown Trade Market & more | Third Apron Podcast
items.author: Third Apron
items.body_excerpt: According to Marc Stein, Nikola Jokic may hold off on extending with the Nuggets. Can they make the moves necessary to convince him to extend? And what kind of trade should the Celtics accept for Jaylen Brown? We discuss that and more. You can follow Yossi on: Twitter:…

items.title: Tyler Marsh credits a mindset shift for Kamilla Cardoso's recent play
items.author: Drew
items.body_excerpt:
Tyler Marsh credits a mindset shift for Kamilla Cardoso's recent play

“Her attention to detail lately, her trust in her teammates, her trust in herself... it’s been evident the last four games.”

Over that span, Cardoso is averaging 21.3 points and shooting 77.8% from the field

items.title: Day'Ron Sharpe and the Nets have agreed to push the team's deadline for picking up Sharpe's Team Option back one day from June 28 to June 29.
items.author: KeithSmithNBA
items.body_excerpt:
Day'Ron Sharpe and the Nets have agreed to push the team's deadline for picking up Sharpe's Team Option back one day from June 28 to June 29.

June 29 is the final day for all player and team options to be decided upon leaguewide. Non-guaranteed contracts can have later deadlines.
